title: crataegus horrida var. longiacuminata
intro: Crataegus horrida var. longiacuminata, also known as the thorny hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its berries, leaves, and flowers exhibiting medicinal properties, such as vasodilatory and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus horrida var. longiacuminata include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant, which may help protect against cell damage and certain diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its berries, leaves, and flowers into teas, extracts, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
